rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port-level assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for bindings.
Use valid AADL component type and implementation scopes for annex placement.
generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic.
Write AGREE contracts inside annex agree {** ... **} blocks with proper type declarations.
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in type-level guarantees without using implementation-only paths.
Ensure AGREE scalar types match AADL expectations: int, real, bool.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **} blocks.
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for expressions.
Constants and equations in AGREE must declare valid types (int, real, bool).
anti_patterns: Do not place component type contracts in implementation scopes or vice versa.
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type annexes unless represented through variables.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
